texto: It’s hard to build models of inflation that don't lead to a multiverse. It’s not impossible, so I think there’s still certainly research that needs to be done. But most models of inflation do lead to a multiverse, and evidence for inflation will be pushing us in the direction of taking [the idea of a] multiverse seriously.
explicacao: Citação de Alan Guth sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It’s hard to build models of inflation that don't lead to a multiverse. It’s not impossible, so I…” articula reflexao, cosmology, inflation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inflation e multiverse.
